title: Additional Information on Workflow Tabs
excerpt: It would be beneficial if we could see more information inside the workflow step bubbles so that there is no need to open them to determine what they will cause to happen, especially when we are spending multiple hours b…

posts.author: KristaBowman (Krista Bowman)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be beneficial if we could see more information inside the workflow step bubbles so that there is no need to open them to determine what they will cause to happen, especially when we are spending multiple hours building workflows with hundreds of checks. The same additional information would be beneficial in the run history as well.

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml: 100 % agree, it is confusing not being able to see which board or column is being checked on an If/else condition
